headline: Micron Blows the Doors Off and Throws the AI Rally a Lifeline
summary: After a third session of selling pressure in chips, Micron's blowout Q4 guide reignited the AI trade after hours. Add Qualcomm's datacenter ambitions, Cerebras' rude welcome to public-company life, and oil sliding back to pre-war levels, Wednesday gave investors plenty to chew on.

headline: Verizon (VZ) Stock Fair Value Edges Higher After Mixed Analyst Revisions
summary: The fair value price target for Verizon Communications has been nudged to about US$51.90 from US$51.85, reflecting only a very small adjustment in the latest valuation work. Behind that modest move, recent research points to a mixed setup, with some analysts emphasizing improving earnings quality, while others focus on slower growth relative to peers and execution risk around convergence. As you read on, you will see how these shifting views can shape the evolving Verizon Communications story...
